ocr_findings.description: '試験にはコレが出る！' rendered as '試験にはつしが出る！' — consistent icon-misread pattern seen across pages.
'学習のポイント' sidebar label in top-right area of image not captured in OCR — decorative label only.

reviewer_notes: ISO 14001, ISO 27001 explanation page plus the ISO規格の覚え方 mnemonic section. All body paragraphs, section headings, and bullet points are faithfully reproduced. Only minor icon-label misread and a decorative sidebar label are missing.
